title: Jerry Seuseu
description: New Zealand and Samoa international rugby league footballer
extract: Jerry Seuseu (born 19 April 1974) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s as a prop. He represented New Zealand and Samoa at international level. After retirement he became Wellbeing and Education manager at the New Zealand Warriors and the manager for the Junior Warriors. He is the current Junior Kiwis Manager as well as the Senior Wellbeing Manager for the New Zealand Warriors
